title: Glowing Torchflower
body:
Mod that make Torchflower (new flower in 1.20) glow in dark

Works better when installed on both the server and the client

![screenshot.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NikitaCartes/Glowing-Torchflower/fabric-1.20.3%2B/screenshot.png)

Also check out my [Glowing Eyeblossom](https://modrinth.com/mod/glowing-eyeblossom) mod!

### Ligth level
- Torchflower: 12
- Torchflower in pot: 14
- Torchflower crop, small: 3
- Torchflower crop, medium: 7
- Torchflower crop, big: 12

### Config
You can change the light level of the Eyeblossom in the config file.  
The config file is located in the `<game directory>/config/GlowingTorchflower/main.conf`.
